Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: Let's work on target practice using our 76mm gun. On the bottom bar, left click on the 76mm button and then right click on the target drone that has appeared.
You can engage targets both from the buttons on the bottom bar, or by right clicking on them in the Tactical Display.
Once the firing starts, switch the camera to the target drone to watch. It's worth noting that gun accuracy is decreased over long distances.
